data.body: MILESTONE — Epic bbf1 CLAIMED (in_progress). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 5 advisory) at HEAD 7cec0f64c. Key env learning: full LLM plan-reviews cannot SIGN under heavy concurrent load because generation includes global tickets-branch HEAD (any agent's ticket write during the ~7min run invalidates it); RECOVERY = 'rebar sign-review <id>' re-signs cheaply from the persisted PASS sidecar (no LLM, tiny window). Worktree fast-forwarded to origin/main 7cec0f64c (was 2 behind; concurrent agents actively landing plan_review changes). Advisories to apply at each child's turn: S3(94f9) file_impact wrong files->fix to src/rebar/_config_schema.py (T8/G4); S4/S5 add git-revert rollback AC (T4); S5 add docs-grep-for-old-paths AC (T7); skip P6 generic AC-quality (ACs already observable). Next: claim S1 ef33 (docs-only ADR §d pin), apply ADR edit, land as stack base.
